proposal_summary: This proposal outlines Cycle 2 of the Uniswap Delegate Reward Initiative, a 6-month compensation program for up to 15 top delegates, aimed at maintaining high participation quality and dedication. Delegates will receive up to $6,000 USD worth of UNI per month based on their offchain/onchain voting participation, rationale writing, and community call attendance. An 84,000 UNI budget is requested.

disclosed_entities.name: StableLab
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: In late February 2024, StableLab proposed the Uniswap Delegate Reward Initiative 14

disclosed_entities.name: Accountability Committee
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The total amount, once approved, will be sent to the Accountability Committee, which will be responsible for the monthly distribution

claimed_actions.raw_action: Transfer UNI budget to Accountability Committee
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Fund 6 months of delegate rewards for 15 delegates.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: We are requesting 540,000 [6000 USD *6 Months *15 Delegates ] USD worth of UNI... which would be 84,000 UNI. The total amount, once approved, will be sent to the Accountability Committee...

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal introduces a points-based system with multiple criteria (voting participation, proposal authorship, other participation) and administrative overhead managed by the Accountability Committee.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: In case there are more than 15 eligible applicants, the top 15 will be chosen by the following objective metrics.

limitations: No precise addresses provided for token or recipient.
